response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience with diverse languages and frameworks, but his background lacks direct focus on enterprise JVM tooling, IDE development, or deep Spring/Kotlin expertise. His open-source contributions and dev tooling work are promising, but alignment with the role's core requirements is partial.
strengths: Extensive experience with developer tooling and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Proven ability to work on complex systems and large-scale codebases (e.g., Stripe, Shopify).
Strong collaboration and knowledge-sharing skills (workshops, talks, mentoring).
concerns: Limited direct experience with enterprise JVM ecosystems (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or IDE internals.
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and D, with only minor Java exposure (no Kotlin mentioned).
Most recent roles focus on full-stack/product development rather than specialized tooling or IDE features.
